title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions:
Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions!
